docs/sqq-dag.md:- **Limitation:** The labeling is static at creation time. There is no automated process to monitor dependencies and "unlock" `agents/wait` issues.
docs/sqq-dag.md:- **Mechanism:** Queries GitHub for issues with the `agents/to-be-taken` label.
docs/sqq-dag.md:- **Limitation:** It is "blind" to any issue labeled `agents/wait`. This requires manual intervention (human or another agent) to re-label issues once their dependencies are met.
docs/sqq-dag.md:- Without a strict DAG (Directed Acyclic Graph) enforcement, agents might implement redundant or conflicting logic because they are both branching from an older state of `main`.
